series_metadata.series_description: These files contain correspondence, applications to renew authority to operate a trust department in the State of Ohio, and receipts evidencing deposits of securities.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Microform: microfilm in operating area as well as off-site storage facility five (5) years from time company ceases do trust business in Ohio ; Paper: paper copy in operating area imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked quality and completeness, . ; Electronic: electronic files five (5) years from time company ceases do trust business in Ohio
retention_rules.disposition_method: Microform: Shred ; Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
